S f a l ^ , ^ R I * r f ^ MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th June, 2012 S.0.1389(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 3 of the Disaster Management Act, 2005 (53 of 2005), the Chairperson of the National Disaster Management Authority has nominated Shri V. K. Duggal, IAS (Retd.) as Member of the said Authority. [F. No. 44-12/2010-NDM-11] R. K. SRJVASTAVA, Jt.
